name: Secondhand Lands
short_description: Secondhand Lands is a massively multiplayer online game set in a fairytale world colored with parody and witty fun. The heroes are comprised of a motley crew of wolves, sheep, catgirls, and scrappers who have pledged their undying allegiance to either Little Bo Peep or Red Riding Hood.
detailed_description:
Secondhand Lands is a massively multiplayer online game set in a fairytale world colored with parody and witty fun. The heroes are comprised of a motley crew of wolves, sheep, catgirls, and scrappers who have pledged their undying allegiance to either Little Bo Peep or Red Riding Hood.

Featuring:
Four races with skill trees.
Crafting system for equipment.
Contests, server events, and big battles.
PvP with guilds and factions.
Pet Combat
Player to player mounting.
Customizable player instances where you can invite your friends.

This game is free to play. You can pay for tokens to buy items, but you can also earn tokens by doing the daily grind.

WARNING: If you're an achievement completionist, then this game isn't for you. The achievements are difficult and more will be added as the game grows. Some achievements may be available only during certain events and never to be seen again.
